brand.name: MyKalaakar
brand.tagline: Connecting Artists, Culture & Events Across India
hero.metric.opportunities: Connecting local talent with real opportunities
section.artForms.title: Traditional forms, presented with respect
section.artForms.subtitle: Discover folk dance, music, ritual performances, and cultural groups rooted in Maharashtra's living traditions.
section.featured.title: Artists with a story, not product cards
section.featured.subtitle: Browse verified performers, ensembles, and cultural specialists with image-led profiles.
section.events.title: Opportunities for the right artists
section.events.subtitle: Event briefs stay clean and artist-focused, with art type matching ready for smarter recommendations.
event.defaultDescription: A curated cultural event looking for authentic Maharashtra artists.
trust.heritageText: A warm platform for Maharashtra's traditional artists, not a shopping marketplace.
trust.opportunityText: Artists, groups, and event hosts can meet through clear cultural context.
trust.matchingText: Events can now target artists by art form, so performers see relevant opportunities.
cta.artist.title: Showcase your art with dignity and reach the events that need you.
cta.artist.text: Build a profile that highlights your tradition, location, media, and performance strengths while the existing approval workflow remains unchanged.
footer.copy: Built for India's artists, event hosts, and cultural communities.
hero.slide1.title: India's No. 1 Artist Platform
hero.slide1.text: Discover the ultimate digital stage uniting musicians, dancers, painters, and creators under one vibrant roof on MyKalakar.
hero.slide1.alt: Dhol Pathak artist performing in traditional attire
hero.slide2.title: Electrifying Folk Revivals
hero.slide2.text: Feel the authentic heartbeat of regional traditions and energetic live folk performances that bring our roots to the modern stage.
hero.slide3.title: Divine Classical Melodies
hero.slide3.text: Immerse yourself in the soulful depth of classical Indian music, where voice and traditional instruments blend in perfect harmony.
hero.slide3.alt: Traditional zanj cymbals in a temple ceremony

hero.slide4.title: Echoes of Heritage
hero.slide4.text: Preserving the legacy of ancient strings, traditional ragas, and sacred acoustic artistry passed down through generations.
hero.slide5.title: Rhythms of the Earth
hero.slide5.text: Celebrate the raw, unyielding spirit of cultural processions, vibrant dhol beats, and the joyous energy of the artistic community.

register.validation.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 3 characters.
register.validation.fullNameRegex: Full name can contain letters, spaces, periods, hyphens, and apostrophes.
register.validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 4 characters.
register.validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.validation.passwordRegex: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one number, and one special character.
register.validation.phoneDigits: Phone number must be exactly 10 digits.
register.validation.emergencyDigits: Emergency contact must be exactly 10 digits.
register.validation.aadharDigits: Aadhaar number must be exactly 12 digits.
register.validation.ifscFormat: IFSC code must strictly match Indian IFSC format.
register.validation.accountMin: Account number must be at least 9 digits.
register.validation.accountMax: Account number must be at most 18 digits.
register.validation.accountDigits: Account number must contain digits only.
register.validation.accountMismatch: Account numbers do not match. Please re-enter.
register.validation.youtubeUrl: Must be a valid YouTube URL (e.g. youtube.com/watch?v=...)

profile.bookings.cancelModal.prompt: Are you sure you want to cancel this booking?
profile.bookings.cancelModal.note: Funds will be returned to your payment account according to the artist's configured cancellation window policy.

profile.bookings.disputeModal.detailPlac: Describe specifically what went wrong (evidence details, scope discrepancy, etc.)
profile.bookings.authModal.title: Additional Payment Auth
profile.bookings.authModal.extraHold: Extra Hold Amount to Authorize: Rs {{amount}}
profile.agreement.title: Booking Agreement
profile.agreement.intro: This document serves as a binding performance contract between the **Client ({{client}})** and the **Artist ({{artist}})** under the following agreed-upon terms:
profile.agreement.escrowBody: The total performance rate is set at **Rs {{amount}}**. The Client has authorized this deposit in platform escrow. Payout will be released to the Artist upon event completion and dispute window resolution.
profile.agreement.cancelBody: Cancellations are subject to platform policy. Refund rates are adjusted based on remaining days before the event starts. No refunds are available for cancellations within 7 days of the date.
artist.demoBio.traditionalGroup: A traditional cultural performance group showcasing art, energy, and heritage...
